matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 7 > Breakfast > Miso Breakfast Set — Maple-Kissed Skillet

node.name: Miso Breakfast Set — Maple-Kissed Skillet
node.short_description: Savory miso skillet with tofu, egg, green onion, and rice—protein-forward breakfast with comforting umami flavor.
node.meal_suggestion: Pair with steamed greens or a side salad; drizzle with a tiny amount of sesame oil; for more fiber, use brown rice; to reduce sodium, opt for low-sodium miso or use less miso; add extra egg or tofu to boost protein.
node.nutrition_note: Protein-rich breakfast from tofu and egg with carbohydrates from rice. Contains soy and sodium from miso; gluten content depends on miso type (use gluten-free miso if needed). For more fiber, swap in brown rice or add vegetables.

context_trace.description: Matched agg_exists(Meal[atom(content =~ "homemade pizza spice wrap")]) on Day 7 (Score: 0.58)

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 1 > Breakfast > Ricotta Toast — Garden Veg Variation

node.name: Ricotta Toast — Garden Veg Variation
node.short_description: Fiber-rich ricotta toast topped with berries and a touch of honey for a balanced breakfast or snack.
node.meal_suggestion: Toast whole-grain bread, spread with ricotta, drizzle with a small amount of honey, and top with fresh berries. Garden Veg Variation: add thin cucumber slices, tomato wedges, or a handful of greens under the ricotta for extra vegetables.
node.nutrition_note: Whole-grain bread provides fiber and sustained energy; ricotta adds protein and calcium; berries deliver vitamins and antioxidants; honey contributes natural sweetness. Suitable as a balanced breakfast or snack; for lower sugar, reduce honey portion.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 6 > Breakfast > Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Mild-Spice Bowl

node.name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Mild-Spice Bowl
node.short_description: Creamy apple-cinnamon porridge made with oats and milk, lightly spiced for a cozy breakfast.
node.meal_suggestion: Serve warm as a creamy porridge; sprinkle with extra cinnamon and diced apple. Add nuts or yogurt for extra protein if desired.
node.nutrition_note: Fiber-rich oats and apple provide fullness; milk contributes calcium and protein; cinnamon adds flavor with minimal added sugar.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 4 > Breakfast > Egg Scramble — Berry Boost Combo

node.name: Egg Scramble — Berry Boost Combo
node.short_description: Protein-packed egg scramble with greens and tomatoes in olive oil, complemented by a berry-side for extra antioxidants.
node.meal_suggestion: Egg scramble with spinach and tomatoes cooked in olive oil; pair with a side of berries for a Berry Boost.
node.nutrition_note: Protein-rich eggs with spinach and tomatoes provide iron, fiber, and vitamin C; olive oil adds heart-healthy fats. This dish is balanced and satiating; adding a side of berries enhances antioxidants to align with the Berry Boost concept.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 3 > Breakfast > Whole-Grain Pancakes — Smoky Plate

node.name: Whole-Grain Pancakes — Smoky Plate
node.short_description: Whole-wheat pancakes with egg and milk, topped with berries and maple syrup.
node.meal_suggestion: Pair with a small serving of Greek yogurt or a handful of nuts to boost protein and healthy fats; use a modest amount of maple syrup to keep added sugars in check.
node.nutrition_note: Fiber-rich from whole-wheat flour; good protein from egg and milk; berries provide vitamins and antioxidants. Maple syrup adds sugars, so portion control is helpful. Contains dairy and gluten.
